items.name: SCP 1334 "Eye-Catching Goggles"
items.description:
SCP 1334 "Eye-Catching Goggles" is an anomalous pair of goggles that grants the wearer enhanced vision, letting them see glowing orbs (representing people/mammals) through walls, although these visual prowess come at a steep cost...

Join for more SCP Items: https://www.roblox.com/communities/14909693/Anomaly-UGC#!/about
